title: Crispy Creamy Bread Crumble
description: A floral and creamy one-pot French dish featuring breadcrumbs baked until crispy with a touch of creaminess, perfect as an easy dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: Bread crumbs
ingredients.notes: Use stale bread for better texture

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine bread crumbs, cream, sugar, flour, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix well until breadcrumbs are coated evenly.
Add fresh herbs if using, mix gently into the batter.
Transfer mixture to an oven-safe dish and bake for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve warm as a dessert or enjoy it as a light snack.
